title: THE BANDSTAND CALLS
subtitle: The Circuit · 3:18 PM · After Brunch · The Second Phone Call of the Hour
epigraph_upright: Three PM. The brunch is over. The Brunch Court has dispersed to their wives, their husbands, their phones. You are in the back of the long black car. The second phone call of the hour is the call to Antonio in New Orleans. The bandstand is across town. The crow has been watching.
epigraph_reversed: Antonio hangs up before you finish. The man writing in the park notebook underlines 'tyranny' twice. The cuff has gotten short.
scene_description: 3:18 PM. Sunday afternoon. The Brunch Court has gone home. Paul is at the long black car. The phone call to Antonio is the central beat — the conversation in §III of the canonical chapter. After the call, the car can move to the park bandstand where John Frank is on a bench, writing AROUND you. SIGNAL at 2 (the day's work has built up a charge). Doctrine at 2. Doubt at 2 (you have been at the day for five hours). Stagnation at 3.
direction_hint: Make the call. Reference his father in the past tense. Drive to the park. Survey the empty park like a king surveying barren lands. SIGNAL to 6. Leap, ideally to the river.
opening_log_lines: 3:18 PM. The Brunch Court has gone home.
You are in the back of the long black car. The driver does not, today, ask.
Antonio's number on the screen. You have not, until now, called him on a Sunday.
The bandstand is across town. The crow has been watching.

stagnation_thresholds.label: 3:18 PM. the car is the car.
the bandstand is across town. the crow is on it.
antonio said the things he said.

doubt_thresholds.label: paul in the back of the long black car. the cuff is, today, twisted.
the tic is back. the seminary thought is back.
antonio said the things he said.

notes: Hard-mode Hierophant. The afternoon after brunch. Antonio reachable on the phone turn 1. Gloria and the Brunch Court return turns 3-4 as the day folds back through the brunch room before the close. THE OFFICE HOLDS in starting hand. Win requires 3 connections + 2 hard moods + SIGNAL to 6 + leap. Reduced turn budget (7), reduced sanity_max (5), elevated stagnation pulse. The RIVERFRONT threshold is the canonical close — the only sunday Paul has ever, in nineteen years, walked down to the muddy divide.
ambient_pool: 3:18 PM. the back of the long black car.
the driver does not, today, ask.
the bandstand crow has been watching all afternoon.
antonio is in new orleans pacing the hot office above ember & ash. you know because the long pauses on his end of the line are the pauses of a man pacing.
your cuff is, since the call, twisted down.
